case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARK SKY GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BRINKERHOFF, KRISTEN L SUBSTITUTED FOR MIXER, MICHAEL J. AS ATTORNEY FOR PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-11-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARK SKY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARK SKY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED SEP-07-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARK SKY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARK SKY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE MAR-12-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
